headline: ConocoPhillips announces first-quarter 2026 results and quarterly dividend
summary: HOUSTON, April 30, 2026--ConocoPhillips today reported first-quarter 2026 earnings of $2.2 billion, or $1.78 per share.

content.title: ConocoPhillips announces first-quarter 2026 results and quarterly dividend

headline: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) Surprises With Strong Q1 CY2026
summary: Oil and gas producer ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, but sales fell by 6.1% year on year to $16.05 billion. Its GAAP profit of $1.78 per share was 4.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) Surprises With Strong Q1 CY2026

headline: ConocoPhillips Q1 EPS beats estimates; shares fall on Qatar output cut
summary: Investing.com -- ConocoPhillips on Thursday reported first-quarter 2026 adjusted earnings per share of $1.89, beating analyst estimates of $1.66, though shares fell over 2% in pre-market trade as the company cut its full-year production outlook citing the ongoing Middle East conflict’s impact on Qatar operations.

headline: ConocoPhillips beats Q1 estimates but trims output outlook, shares slip
summary: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) reported first-quarter 2026 results on Thursday that exceeded analyst expectations, though shares declined more than 2% in premarket trading after the company lowered its full-year production forecast due to disruptions affecting its Qatar operations. Adjusted earnings per share came in at $1.

headline: Is ConocoPhillips (COP) Still Attractively Priced After Its Strong Year To Date Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether ConocoPhillips at around US$128.25 is still offering value or starting to look fully priced, you are asking the right question. The stock has had a mixed short term picture, with a 4.6% gain over the last 7 days, a 3.5% decline over the last 30 days, and returns of 32.6% year to date and 48.8% over the past year. Recent coverage has focused on ConocoPhillips as a major US oil and gas producer, with attention on its role in the energy sector and how commodity...

headline: ConocoPhillips (COP) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: As we begin, I want to start by acknowledging the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.  Consistent with our track record, it is still early days, but we are excited about the opportunity and the results and more low cost of supply resources coming to the Greater Willow area.
